recommendedCycles.note: Consult your healthcare provider to determine the appropriate AOD-9604 cycle for your condition.

injectionSite.description: Administer injections into subcutaneous fat (such as the stomach, thigh, or arm). Rotate injection sites to avoid irritation.

timeOfDay.morning: Administer in the morning on an empty stomach at least 2 hours before food.
timeOfDay.night: Alternatively administer at night at least 1 hour after your last meal.

instructions.importantInformation: This is a compounded medication dispensed only by prescription. Use strictly as directed by your doctor. Do not change the dose without medical advice. Consult your doctor regarding side effects, contraindications, and possible drug interactions.

recommendedCycles.note: Consult your healthcare provider to determine the appropriate BPC-157 cycle for your condition.

injectionSite.description: Administer injections into subcutaneous fat (such as the stomach, thigh or arm) or directly into the area of injury or soreness for targeted relief. Rotate injection sites to avoid irritation.

timeOfDay.general: BPC-157 can be injected any time of day. Some people prefer doing it in the morning or evening depending on how it fits into their routine.

instructions.importantInformation: This is a compounded medication dispensed only by prescription. Use strictly as directed by your doctor. Do not change the dose without medical advice. Consult your doctor regarding side effects, contraindications, and possible drug interactions.

doseProtocol: Option 1: Once daily, 5 units (100 mcg / 100 mcg) at bedtime, 2 hours after your last meal.
Option 2: Twice daily, 5 units (100 mcg / 100 mcg) in the morning 1 hour before breakfast and 5 units (100 mcg / 100 mcg) at bedtime, 2 hours after your last meal.
Option 3: Once daily, 10 units (200 mcg / 200 mcg) at bedtime, 2 hours after your last meal.

penDetails.totalPeptide: Contains 6 mg / 6 mg of CJC-1295 / Ipamorelin
penDetails.duration: 8 weeks for Option 1, 4 weeks for Option 2 and 3 of Dose Protocol

recommendedCycles.duration: 1 to 3 months, depending on indication and clinical response.
recommendedCycles.note: Consult your healthcare provider to determine the appropriate CJC / Ipamorelin cycle for your condition.

injectionSite.description: Administer injections into subcutaneous fat (such as the stomach, thigh or arm). Rotate injection sites to avoid irritation.

timeOfDay.general: CJC/Ipamorelin is typically recommended fasted, either in the evening or before bedtime, ideally 2 hours after your last meal, or in the morning 1 hour before breakfast. This aligns with the body's natural peak in growth hormone release.

recommendedCycles.duration: 10 consecutive days, can be repeated after 6 months (maximum 2 cycles per year).

timeOfDay.general: Epithalon is typically injected in the evening or before bedtime. This helps enhance its benefits for improving sleep quality and promoting the body’s natural circadian rhythms.
